h1.visual_description: Green, bold, sans-serif font, larger than body text, used for primary section headers.

h2.visual_description: Bold, black text at the start of a paragraph, typically preceded by a lowercase letter and period.
h2.example_text: l. Replace Plastics with Recyclable Materials.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption, typically in a teal/blue color and smaller font.
Footnote citation entry at the bottom of the page.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: superscript numeric indices in-text corresponding to a numbered list of URLs in the footer.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number and document title ('Study on Plastics Use and Waste Management in the Food Service Industry') located in the bottom footer margin; numbered source URLs located just above the footer.
